center.name: 古纳亚拉原住民区
center.summary: 古纳亚拉原住民区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Moustached antwren、Yellow-throated chlorospingus、Black-headed brushfinch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama in eastern Panamá, eastern Guna Yala (San Blas) , and eastern Darién provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Panama, on the Caribbean slope in the Panama Canal area and Guna Yala (San Blas) and on the Pacific slope from Panamá Province east

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama from Bocas del Toro Province to Coclé Province and separately in western Guna Yala (formerly called San Blas Province). It also apparently is found on Cerro Tacarcuna in extreme northwestern Colombia on the Panama border.Renjifo, L
